六、阅读理解
Tom is a twelve-year-old boy. He gets up at six thirty every morning. He usually walks to school because his home is near the school. His favorite subject is English. After school, he often plays basketball with his friends.

1. How old is Tom?
A. Ten.
B. Eleven.
C. Twelve.
D. Thirteen.
2. Why does Tom walk to school?
A. Because his bike is broken.
B. Because his home is near the school.
C. Because he likes walking in the rain.
D. Because he has no bus card.
答案及解析
1. C 解析：文中说 Tom is a twelve-year-old boy。
2. B 解析：文中说 because his home is near the school。
